hypothesis: Combining Aroon Up/Down breakouts with Volume Oscillator confirmation filters out false signals and aligns with increasing momentum, while volatility filtering reduces whipsaws.

Combining Aroon Up/Down with a bullish Volume Oscillator crossover, filtered by low implied volatility, aims to capture early momentum shifts while minimizing false signals during periods of low volatility.
Combining Aroon Up/Down with Volume Oscillator confirms momentum shifts, while filtering with a low implied volatility percentile reduces false signals during periods of low market confidence.
